Our DNA

Professional Environment.
Welcoming Community.

RC Fitness Club provides a complete fitness experience with modern gym equipment, expert trainers, and customized workout programs. Located above Moriz Restaurant in Brookefield, we are committed to helping you achieve your goals in a motivating, high-energy atmosphere.

Expert Trainers

Certified professionals dedicated to your peak performance.

Elite Equipment

The latest machines and free weights for serious results.

Programs

Precision Training

Personal Training

Customized 1-on-1 coaching for rapid transformation and precision technique.

Request Details

Weight Loss

Metabolic conditioning designed to burn fat and maintain lean muscle mass.

Request Details

Muscle Building

Hypertrophy-focused training using high-volume science-backed splits.

Request Details

Strength Training

Master the big compound lifts and increase your absolute strength capacity.

Request Details

Cardio Workouts

Intense conditioning sessions to boost heart health and lung capacity.

Request Details

Group Fitness

High-energy community sessions led by motivating instructors.

Request Details

Choose Us
